calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-22-2022 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-13-2021 Set For Trial On Aug-15-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO AMEND COMPLAINT/CROSS COMPLAINT/ANSWER
Off Calendar Oct-21-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF FRANK MARTELLO'S MOTION TO AMEND FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

No appearances are made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff Frank Martello's motion to amend first Amended Complaint is granted. The motion is supported by the strong policy of liberality in permitting amendments to pleadings. The Court declines to address defendant's argument that the proposed amendment fails to allege a valid claim for defamation. (See California Casualty Gen. Ins. v. Superior Court (1985) 173 Cal.App.3d 274, 281 ["the preferable practice would be to permit the amendment and allow the parties to test its legal sufficiency by demurrer, motion for judgment on the pleadings or other appropriate proceedings."].)

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/EPS)
